priority_basis: M-001 remains the only canonical continuity-owned item. Its handoff requires contradiction-safe history; recent follow-on commits exposed a durable ambiguity between the older canonical queue snapshot and newer additive queue updates.

completed.action: Defined a provenance-preserving state-precedence and temporal reconciliation contract for canonical snapshots, owner-scoped deltas, implementation evidence, and continuity records.

claim_states.observed: The cited ACTIVE_QUEUE blob is older than a later continuity-owned queue-update and its implementation commit.
claim_states.inferred: Current queue state requires baseline-plus-delta reconciliation.
claim_states.proposed: Implement an executable validator that applies the policy across every owner-scoped queue update.
claim_states.superseded: Treating the canonical queue file as necessarily exhaustive of later work.
claim_states.unresolved: No atomic consolidation protocol or authenticated validator run exists yet.

next_action: Build a fail-closed queue-delta validator that checks owner/item consistency, commit existence, ordering, duplicate deltas, and unresolved evidence claims before computing current state.
